title: Surgeon Vacancy at CMC Vellore - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at CMC Vellore - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CMC Vellore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CMC Vellore:
CMC Vellore is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore!
